overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a medieval tavern at night. The character walks through narrow stone corridors into a candlelit main hall with wooden tables and NPCs, then exits to an exterior balcony overlooking dark trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with arched doorways

events.description: passing a lit wall sconce, warm illumination becomes visible on the right wall
approaching the wooden doorway leading to the main tavern hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow stone corridors toward a lit doorway ahead

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
stone archway leading to the next section of corridor
iron wall-mounted torch holder with warm orange flame
dark wooden door with metal hinges set in the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with rough walls and arched doorways. Warm light from a wall sconce illuminates the right side as the character approaches a wooden door leading to the main tavern area.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern main hall with dining tables and patrons

events.description: entering the main tavern hall from the narrow corridor, space opens up
navigating between wooden tables, turning slightly to avoid furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through the tavern hall between wooden tables, observing the seated patrons

notable_agents.action: male patron sitting at a wooden table, facing toward the center of the room
patron sitting alone at a table near the back wall

entered.detail: long wooden dining table with benches, lit by candlelight
thick stone support column with decorative base
exposed dark wooden beams supporting the ceiling
decorative woven wall hanging with geometric patterns
large ceramic storage jars stacked against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious tavern hall with stone walls, wooden ceiling beams, and candlelit tables. Several NPCs sit at the tables as the character navigates between the furniture toward the back of the room, passing stone pillars and decorative wall tapestries.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior balcony at night with wooden railing

events.description: opening wooden door and stepping from interior tavern to exterior balcony
transition from warm candlelight to dark night with minimal ambient light

agents.ego_description: opening the wooden exit door and stepping out onto a balcony overlooking the night

entered.detail: simple wooden balustrade along the edge of the balcony
dark night sky visible above the tree line
dark silhouettes of trees against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character opens a wooden door at the back of the tavern and steps out onto an exterior balcony at night. The warm interior light gives way to darkness as the character moves along the stone balcony with a wooden railing, with tree silhouettes visible against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a stone corridor into a bustling tavern hall and finally out into the cool night air. It begins by navigating a narrow, dimly lit passage with rough walls, guided by the warm glow of a wall sconce toward a wooden door. As the character pushes through the entrance, the space expands into a spacious hall filled with candlelit tables, wooden ceiling beams, and NPCs seated among stone pillars and decorative tapestries. The camera then moves through the crowd toward the rear of the room before opening another door to step outside. The warm interior light finally gives way to darkness on an exterior stone balcony, where the view opens up to silhouettes of trees against the night sky.
